authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(101) — Nelson Corral Reservoir and tributary (Lassen Co.)
sources.quotedText: (101) Nelson Corral Reservoir and tributary (Lassen Co.). (A) Nelson Corral Reservoir. All year. 2 trout. 4 trout in possession. (B) Nelson Corral Reservoir tributary (the unnamed tributary entering the reservoir at the north end). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Nelson Corral Reservoir Fishing - Overview, Species & Conditions | Fishcaddy
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — California Department of Fish and Wildlife
sources.quotedText: R1        Lassen        Nelson Corral Lake     Eagle Lake Trout    Fingerling    Put and Grow            May-June

groups.humanSummary: Nelson Corral Reservoir and tributary: the reservoir itself is open all year with a reduced 2-trout daily / 4-trout possession limit, while its unnamed inlet tributary at the north end is closed to all fishing all year.
groups.verbatimText: Nelson Corral Reservoir and tributary (Lassen Co.). (A) Nelson Corral Reservoir. All year. 2 trout. 4 trout in possession. (B) Nelson Corral Reservoir tributary (the unnamed tributary entering the reservoir at the north end). Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Nelson Corral Reservoir is open to fishing all year

parameters.counting_rule: Reduced limit of 2 trout daily, 4 trout in possession, applies to Nelson Corral Reservoir itself (lower than the statewide default 5-trout limit).

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag limit, 4 trout in possession

parameters.note: Applies to the unnamed tributary that enters Nelson Corral Reservoir at the north end; the reservoir itself is not closed by this provision.

regulations.humanSummary: Nelson Corral Reservoir's unnamed north-end inlet tributary is closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Nelson Corral Reservoir tributary (the unnamed tributary entering the reservoir at the north end). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists Nelson Corral Lake for a fingerling-size 'Put and Grow' release of Eagle Lake Trout during the May-June release month range; the Department describes these as provisional plans, not a guarantee of execution.
